title: Classic Clouds
description: Do you miss the Old Clouds? Well this is the Pack for You.
body:
# Classic Clouds
This resource pack changes the new clouds from 1.21.6+ to the old clouds from 1.21.5 and before.
## Preview
![Clouds from Above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a25d55f8390caea47eee768861874bd478ac9fde.png)![Plains Clouds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e079e42495f886529b7bf7f41cb5aedbdb0e0b9.jpeg)
